questions.prompt: Please keep your desk clean and ____ before the teacher comes in.
questions.explain: clean and tidy 是固定搭配，表示「乾淨又整齊」。

questions.prompt: The park ____ we played basketball yesterday is near my house.
questions.explain: park 是地點，後面 we played basketball yesterday 已經完整，所以用 where。若用 which，應改成 which we played basketball in。

questions.prompt: I know the girl ____ hair is pink.
questions.explain: 要表示「那個女孩的頭髮」，需要所有格關係代名詞 whose。

questions.prompt: Mom asked me to ____ my room before dinner.
questions.explain: 這裡 tidy 當動詞，表示「整理」。

questions.prompt: Both the teacher and the students ____ excited about the trip.
questions.explain: both A and B 視為複數，過去式要用 were。

questions.prompt: There are twelve ____ on the shopping list, but Dad bought only nine.
questions.explain: 購物清單上的一個一個項目要用 items。

choices: If it will rain tomorrow, we will cancel the game.
If it rains tomorrow, we will cancel the game.
If it rained tomorrow, we will cancel the game.
If it raining tomorrow, we will cancel the game.
questions.explain: 第一類條件句：If + 現在式, 主句 + will + 原形動詞。

questions.prompt: Neither you nor he ____ to go there tomorrow.
questions.explain: 靠近動詞的是 he，所以用 has。

questions.prompt: I didn’t hear the last part. Could you ____ it, please?
questions.explain: 聽不清楚時，請對方再說一次，要用 repeat。

questions.prompt: I bought not only tea but also ____.
questions.explain: tea 和 bread 都是 bought 的受詞，所以要保持平行，直接用 bread。
